translations.en: KSandy
a shifty-eyed man with a strange smile. He smells of rancid grease and cooking smoke.
translations.zh: 一個目光閃爍、笑容詭異的男子。身上散著腐油與煙塵之味。

translations.en: "Hello there, $G."
"That big, carefully wrapped bundle could only be a dragon's egg!"
translations.zh: 「那細心包裹的大包袱，必是巨龍之蛋無疑！」

translations.en: "Will you give it to me?"
"I guess I cannot help you much, then."
translations.zh: 「那我大概也幫不上汝什麼忙。」

translations.en: "Now I can make Humble Pie!" Overjoyed, he gives you a hug.
translations.zh: 「我終能做出謙派啦！」他喜不自勝，給汝一個擁抱。

translations.en: "So, does the subject of @pirates interest you?"
translations.zh: 「那麼，@pirates（海盜）這話題汝可有興趣？」

translations.en: He shrugs. "As you wish."
"Well, first, there is one in Serpent's Hold. I cannot recall her name, but she has a piece of the map with her."
translations.zh: 「首先，蛇要塞有一人。我記不得她姓名，但她持有地圖一角。」

translations.en: "Second, there is one on Dagger Isle. A hermit."
"Third, I know of a pirate at Empath Abbey, or thereabouts. Nathaniel Moorehead was his name."
translations.zh: 「其三，神交修道院附近有一海盜，名喚納薩尼爾·摩爾黑。」

translations.en: "The @fourth... but then maybe I've said too much already."
translations.zh: 「@fourth（第四）個……不過或許我已說得太多了。」

translations.en: "My name is Sandstone Angus."
"Most folks call me Sandy."
"I cook for Lord @Whitsaber."
"He especially likes my recipe for fish in a white wine @sauce."
translations.zh: 「他特別中意我的白酒@sauce（醬汁）鮮魚一道。」

translations.en: "It's my specialty!"
"Before Lord Whitsaber came to Trinsic to be our mayor, he had another job..."
translations.zh: 「白刃領主來特林希克任市長之前，另有一行當……」

translations.en: "As first mate to Captain Hawkins himself! His real name is Alastor Gordon."
translations.zh: 「他乃霍金斯船長的大副！本名為阿拉斯托·戈登。」

translations.en: "Hmmm. I'd better get back to cooking... Excuse me."
He walks away mumbling, "Magincian @pastry..."
translations.zh: 他邊走邊咕噥：「馬精西亞@pastry（點心）……」

translations.en: "Truly it shall be a magnificent desert!"
"I could do you a @favor if you did one for me first."
translations.zh: 「汝先為我效勞，我便能還汝一個@favor（恩情）。」

translations.en: "Only a @dragon's will do."
"There's a lair in the dungeon Destard, to the northwest."
translations.zh: 「西北方戴斯塔地穴中有龍巢。」

translations.en: "It's not far."
"Bye."
"Sorry, I can't help you with that."
"Let's see..."
"'A golden orb on a crystal sea, in a box sans hinges, lid, or key.'"
translations.zh: 「『晶海之上有金球，匣無樞鉸、無蓋、無鑰可開。』」

translations.en: "I'll give you one guess to this riddle."
"Very good!"
"It's an egg, of course."
"To make Magincian pastry, I require one dragon's @egg."
translations.zh: 「欲製馬精西亞點心，須一枚巨龍之@egg（蛋）。」

translator_notes: Sandy = 特林希克廚師，劇情關鍵 NPC：給他 dragon's egg 才能換 pirates 線索。riddle 是 dragon's egg 的詩謎，翻譯保留意境。
